title: Dullahan
description: You also want to be Wild in Minecraft? Now you can. Replaces the Skeleton horse with Dullahan
body:
![Model in game (Heathcliff not included)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a7120f4313ed144cbfbbf958f00ba02e1b0d89a.png)

### **REQUIRES OPTIFINE OR [EMF] AND [ETF] (if fabric)**


Replaces the skeleton horse with Dullahan from Limbus Company

Only the model itself is changed, the sounds and animations remain the unchaged

Most likely works with other versions as well
